title: VQA v2.0 - Visual Question Answering
description: Visual question answering requiring annotators to answer natural language questions about images, based on the VQA v2.0 dataset (Goyal et al., CVPR 2017). Supports both open-ended and yes/no question types.
citation:
@inproceedings{goyal2017making,
    title = "Making the {V} in {VQA} Matter: Elevating the Role of Image Understanding in Visual Question Answering",
    author = "Goyal, Yash  and Khot, Tejas  and Summers-Stay, Douglas  and Batra, Dhruv  and Parikh, Devi",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)",
    year = "2017",
    pages = "6904--6913"
}
